About Skills Projects Certifications Contact

About Me

Motivated and eager fresher with foundational knowledge in web development and cybersecurity. Skilled in building responsive websites and understanding security best practices to protect applications from common threats. Seeking an opportunity to apply my skills, learn from industry professionals, and contribute to developing secure and efficient software solutions.

Education

  • Silicon University – Master in Computer Application (Expected 2026), Bhubaneswar
  • Kolhan University – B.Sc. in Information Technology (2023), Chakradharpur

Skills

C, Java, Python
SQL, MongoDB
HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js
Linux, Windows
Team Collaboration, Problem-Solving

Projects

7th Heaven (Restaurant Website)

Full-stack restaurant web app with authentication, menu browsing, cart, and MongoDB backend.

Auction Hub (Ongoing)

Responsive auction platform with live countdowns, secure login, and bid tracking.

Certifications

  • Cisco Networking Academy – Introduction to Cybersecurity (2025)
  • GeeksforGeeks – Full Stack Developer Bootcamp
  • Deloitte – Cyber Job Simulation (2025)

Contact

Feel free to reach out to me for collaborations or opportunities.
